name: Orange Cinnamon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a large skillet, and brown chicken. Remove the chicken from the skillet when it is browned.
2. Combine all other ingredients (except flour) in the skillet. Mix well and pour over the chicken.
3. Cover the pot and turn the heat to LOW. Cook for 4-6 hours, or until the chicken is tender.
4. Remove one cup of sauce from the pot and combine it with the flour, mixing well.
5. Return the sauce-flour mixture to the pot.
6. Turn the heat to HIGH and cook for an additional half hour.
